meta.title: Vibe Coding the Weirdest Synth Ever Made (AI VODER)
meta.description:
I built a modern replica of The Voder — the first talking machine ever created (1939).
No samples, no autotune... just buzz, hiss, and code.

Support by joining The Nobody Collective here: 
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
You’ll also get access to tutorials, behind-the-scenes info, code, prompts, and much more.

all the links with prompts,  Claude Artifacts and Custon GPT for UI design:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/voder-ai-replica-142357337

#AIVoder #VoderReplica #NobodyAndTheComputer #GenerativeAI #AIMusic #VoiceSynth #SoundDesign #AIExperiment #AnthropicClaude #ChatGPT #AICinema #CreativeCoding #VintageTech #SpeechSynthesis #VibeCoding #Electronica #BellLabs #AIVoice #MachineLearning #RetroFuture
